name: Srivatsan Srinivasa Raghavan
title: Fullstack Javascript Developer
summary: Full-stack JavaScript Developer with 7 years of experience building scalable web applications. Expert in Frontend development using Angular (6 years) and React (1 year), paired with robust Backend architecture using NestJS (3 years) and Express.js (4 years). Proven track record in maintaining system reliability through production monitoring with Datadog and Microsoft App Insights, and streamlining deployments via Jenkins CI/CD pipelines. Before transitioning into full-time JavaScript development 7 years ago, I spent 8 years as an SDET, mastering automation ecosystems including UFT/QTP, Selenium, WebdriverIO, and recently, Cypress. I leverage this extensive QA background to deliver production-ready code with superior testability.

details: Built core frontend components in Angular with HTML & CSS & Ag Grid and designed NestJS API endpoints for a product from its scratch.
Continuously refactored the codebase by creating shared, reusable utility methods, which reduced redundancy across the stack.
Integrated RabbitMQ to handle inter-service messaging, which allowed our backend services to communicate asynchronously.
Drafted architecture diagrams for upcoming services, focusing on making the implementation modular and easy to scale as we grew.
Participated in the on-call rotation, where I used Datadog to track down root causes and maintain system uptime.
Managed and updated Azure Function Apps to ensure background services stayed reliable.
Provided detailed feedback during peer code reviews, focusing on logic improvements and maintainability.
Ensured unit test coverage using Karma-Jasmine and Jest, catching bugs earlier in the dev cycle
Designed and developed a Web portal using Angular with HTML & CSS and ExpressJS, which improved collaboration and communication among QAs.
Improved product performance by refactoring an existing C# source code.
Contributed to the AWS pipeline, optimizing delivery time for software releases.
Developed Jenkins jobs, streamlining build and deployment processes.
Contributed to the maintenance of Test Automation framework built over Protractor and Selenium.
Collaborated on the development of a web portal for Authorization Management using Reactjs, Javascript, Axios and Nodejs.
Managed a team of three automation testers, driving successful test automation initiatives using Watir for two different products
Managed a team of three automation testers and successfully planned and executed the development of a Groovy-based test automation suite.
Test automation scripts in VBScript developed using UFT and ALM. Maintained the health check suite for the entire application.
Developed test automation scripts in VBScript using UFT to improve efficiency and accuracy of testing processes.
